verifications.detail: SKILL.md documents purpose, procedure, inputs, output schema, edge cases. X.yaml defines harness with sealed + failure cases.
2 harness cases: within-cap-reminder (sealed), cap-reached-escalate (failure). Both passed.
cap-reached-escalate case: aging_days=60, cap=3, step=3 >= cap. Skill exits 1 with escalation JSON on stderr. No reminder_proposal emitted.
Dogfood run with cap=1 produces sealed receipt sha256:1575dec13e9b20980a5cb4eeaf97b7facf5490c97e563dafad8622fd2de8e644. Verify output captured.
PR #137 opened against runxhq/runx with skills/dunning-ladder/ package.
